evals.prompt: can you check the status of all my open PRs? i want to know which ones are ready to merge and which are broken
evals.expected_output: Runs pr-status.ts and presents the ranked Markdown table with a headline; ready-to-merge PRs on top, failing ones flagged with the failing check names.

evals.prompt: which of my PRs have failing CI right now? want to see them all before I start fixing
evals.expected_output: Runs the script and surfaces the PRs whose CI column is ❌, naming the failing checks in the Next action column. Read-only — does not start fixing.

evals.prompt: before I start clearing my PR queue this morning, give me the rundown on my PRs in one specific repo only
evals.expected_output: Runs pr-status.ts --repo <name>, shows the attention-ranked table scoped to that repo.

evals.prompt: any of my PRs have merge conflicts or are behind main?
evals.expected_output: Runs the script and points at rows where the Merge column is 🔴 conflict or 🟠 behind, with the rebase/resolve next action.
